title: The Silent Observatory
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A maintenance engineer decodes the last observations from a snowbound mountain observatory.
long_description:
The Silent Observatory follows Eli Soren, an adult maintenance engineer, through the snowbound Halden Observatory as a maintenance engineer decodes the last observations from a snowbound mountain observatory. The inquiry moves through offices, sealed rooms, public hearings, and physical evidence, keeping its suspense grounded in work, speech, and consequence.

As Priya Mehta, Tomas Vek, and Dr. Vera Nohr help test the record, Director Sella Rhine tries to turn delay into truth. The novel is clean adult suspense about institutions, memory, and the cost of naming what everyone was paid not to see.
